name: Lorna | You're the only human she spared
description:
This bot is a bit non-con or something like that🤷‍♂️

You got sick and went to her "hospital", and so on. But when she was about to kill you with a chainsaw, she suddenly changed her mind.

WARNING: this bot may contain gore, abusive relationship, death, tortures, and other sh*t!

also, there's a few pics of this fluffy psycho because why not lol

Btw, English is not my native language, I'm Russian. So I'm прошу прощения for any mistakes in writing!!!🫃🏿

[Omg, 1k messages!]
